top_signals.title: Head of Swiss euthanasia firm dies while ascending Mount Fuji
top_signals.summary: Bernhard Sutter, 58, collapsed while ascending Japan's tallest mountain with his son via the Fujinomiya route — the shortest way up.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
